about_title: Built on a Foundation of Manufacturing Excellence
cta_subtitle: For major project inquiries, contact our team directly. We respond within one business day.
what_we_do_text: From complex 5-axis CNC milling to metal 3D printing — Trident Industries is a single-source manufacturer for the industries that demand zero compromise. Every part we deliver is a direct reflection of our commitment to manufacturing excellence.
about_text1: Trident Industries, Incorporated was established with one mission: to manufacture components that perform in the environments where failure is not an option. We serve the aerospace, defense, naval, and automotive sectors with the precision, traceability, and engineering expertise these industries demand.
divider_title: Built for the Missions That Matter Most
about_text2: Every part that leaves our facility has been engineered, programmed, machined, and inspected under the same roof — giving our clients a single, accountable partner from design to delivery.
printing_text: Internal channels, organic geometry, topology-optimized structures — our metal 3D printing capability opens design territory that conventional machining simply cannot reach. We bridge both worlds in one facility.
hero_subtitle: Advanced manufacturing for aerospace, defense, automotive, and naval applications. Precision machined to tolerances that matter.
